title: An Act amending the operations of the city of Boston Finance Commission to establish the Boston Inspector General Oversight Commission

abstracts.abstract: By Ms. Miranda, a petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2956) of Liz Miranda (with the approval of the mayor and city council) for legislation to amend the operations of the city of Boston Finance Commission to establish the Boston Inspector General Oversight Commission.  Municipalities and Regional Government.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

related_entities.name: the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government
committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 03/03/2026 from 01:00 PM-03:00 PM in 222
Hearing rescheduled to 03/03/2026 from 01:00 PM-01:30 PM in 222            and Virtual Hearing updated to New End Time
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means
